revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image, pixel-art asset sheet.

Canvas and sheet requirements:
- Exact final image size: 64x80 pixels.
- 1 row x 1 column, one frame only, frame size 64x80 pixels.
- Solid #FF00FF chroma-key background fills all empty space; no gradients, no transparency.
- No cell separators, no grid lines, no borders, no numbers, no labels, no text, no watermarks.
- Keep clear solid magenta margin between the tree and every canvas edge.
- No detached fragments: no isolated pixel islands, dust specks, seam slivers, or leftover residue.

Subject:
- One Japanese red pine tree (akamatsu), front view, as a single coherent authored game field prop.
- Elegant gently S-curved reddish-brown trunk, visible trunk shadow, root details, and soft contact shadow at the roots.
- Layered cloud-like pads of deep saturated green pine needles, shrine-garden style, asymmetric canopy with overhangs and varied leaf clusters.
- Tree fills most of the 64x80 canvas while preserving margins.
- Bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette: deep rich early-summer greens, subtle blue-green accents, vermilion and white accent touches if natural, soft warm sunlight.
- NOT dry, NOT yellow-brown, NOT prairie/wasteland, NOT dark or gloomy.

Pixel-art style:
- SNES / 16-bit platformer field-prop aesthetic.
- Crisp low-resolution pixels, hard pixel edges, no antialiasing blur, no painterly softness.
- Consistent palette, readable clusters, one-pixel dark outline where useful.
- Top-left light source with clear highlights and shadows.
- Draw as one coherent large object, not repeated tile stamps or stacked square tiles.
- Break rectangular silhouettes with overhangs, asymmetric detail, shadows, and varied texture.
- Clean readable footprint suitable for later slicing into 16x16 engine tiles.

Avoid:
- No recognizable characters, logos, likenesses, UI, emblems, or watermarks from existing games, animation, or media.
- No samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, bird, companion creature, letter emblem, or text.

Output must be a single crisp PNG image only.
